title: aconitum bartletii var. fukutomei
intro: Aconitum bartletii var. fukutomei, also known as the Fukutome monk's hood, is a variety of the Aconitum bartletii plant, belonging to the Aconitum genus of flowering plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Aconitum bartletii var. fukutomei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism and arthritis, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the roots are typically dried and processed into a powder or tincture, which can be used to make teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
